calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Farm Automobile Insurance Co.
Vivian Barbary, the insured party, and Louise Manos, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Eric Fuentes-Pineda.
Default was entered against defendant on March 30, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Farm Automobile Insurance Co., and against the Defaulted Defendant Eric Fuentes-Pineda as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,676.44.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Per Memorandum of Costs.

Total - $39,176.44.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
